subcodes.first_line: O compassionate friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The honoured pilgrim, Mírzá Bábá, hath attained the Most Exalted Threshold and remembereth the beloved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء جناب زائر میرزا بابا بعتبه علیا مشرف و بیاد احبا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
